title: eliokarmos constrictus
intro: Eliokarmos constrictus, also known as the "Tobacco Bush" or "Indian Tobacco", is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Eliokarmos constrictus has been used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its ability to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory illnesses.
